title: CS50 for Business - Lecture 7 - Deploying Databases
summary: CS50 for Business Lecture 7 covers deploying and managing databases at scale using SQL and NoSQL. The course teaches best practices for efficient data storage and querying. It is offered through edX with a certificate option.
